# Golden Padel Club Tanger - Factual Summary

## General Info
- **Name**: Golden Padel Club
- **Type**: Premium Indoor Padel Club (Sports Activity Location)
- **Location**: Marjane Route de Rabat, Tanger, Maroc (Near Marjane supermarket)
- **Established**: 2023

## Facilities & Courts
- **Total Courts**: 4 indoor (covered) courts
- **Turf Surface**: Mondo Supercourt (professional world padel tour quality)
- **Amenities**: Complete vestiaries (changing rooms), hot showers, lockers, pro-shop for gear and balls, free secure parking, café/lounge area.

## Opening Hours
- **Every Day (7/7)**: 09:00 - 00:00 (Midnight)

## Pricing
- **Court Rental (90 minutes)**: 240 MAD
- **Racket Rental**: 30 MAD per match

## Booking & Reservation
- **Booking Flow**: Real-time slot booking on the website with storage in Firebase Firestore, followed by instant validation and check-in via WhatsApp redirect (+212600000000).
- **Direct Reservation Link**: https://wa.me/212600000000

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: +212600000000
- **WhatsApp**: +212600000000
- **Instagram**: https://instagram.com/goldenpadelclubtanger
- **Address**: Marjane Route de Rabat, Tanger, Maroc
- **Coordinates**: Latitude 35.7336, Longitude -5.8336 (approximate)

## Languages Supported
- French (FR)
- Arabic (AR)
- Spanish (ES)
